name: Corporate Charter Holders
description: The corporate charter system is the legal fiction under which a great deal of interstellar commerce actually runs. A charter holder is a corporation that has been granted extrastellar jurisdiction over a defined territory — usually a station, a trade lane, or a small system — in exchange for tax revenue and a seat at the ISC trade-bloc table. The charters compete with each other. They cooperate when one of them is threatened by a Compact annexation, and break each other's supply chains the moment the threat passes. The question of whether the charter system can hold is, in practice, the question of whether the ISC can hold. The charters would prefer not to be the ones that have to answer it.
